axioms.name: Mutual boundary
axioms.statement: In CE, X's stability depends on Y's boundary condition B_y, and Y's stability depends on B_x.

axioms.name: Authority re-entry
axioms.statement: Authority edits A_x and A_y re-enter each other's next transitions.

axioms.name: Noise/Reality inversion
axioms.statement: Signals treated as noise by a model can function as reality anchors for persistence.

axioms.name: Closure coupling risk
axioms.statement: Closure in one side can pull the coupled system toward closure as a whole.

axioms.name: Editing as governance
axioms.statement: Open persistence in CE requires AEP-like editing to operate as coupled governance.
